ChainTokenPriceMap.description:
All token prices for a given chain

Attributes:
    currencyId (str): price service id of the currency
    tokenPrices (dict): Token and price

CurrencyInfo.description:
Schema for supported currency info

Attributes:TokenPrice
    id (str): price service id of the currency
    name (str): name of currency corresponding to ID

CurrencyInfoList.description:
Schema for list of supported currency info

Attributes:
    currencies (List[CurrencyInfo]): list of supported currency info entries

CurrentBlockNumber.description:
Schema for current block number response

Attributes:
    blockNumber (int): current odos block number

PathRequestV2.description: Public facing path request v2 schema

PathRequestV3.description: Public facing path request v3 schema

PathResponse.description:
Assembled Path Transaction Response including quote, transaction, and simulation data

Attributes:
    blockNumber (int): block number of transaction quote
    gasEstimate (int): gas estimate for tran

PathVizImageConfig.description: Schema for path viz image config

Simulation.description:
Simulation data schema

Attributes:
    is_success (bool): true if no errors were detected during simulation
    amountsOut (List[int]): list of amounts out from simulation
    gasEstimate (int): on-c

SimulationError.description:
Simulation error schema

Attributes:
    type (str): error type
    errorMessage (str): content of the simulation error message

TokenPrice.description:
Schema for basic token price structure

Attributes:
    currencyId (str): price service id of the currency
    price (Optional[float]): fiat price of asset if it is available

Transaction.description:
Assembled Transaction Schema

Attributes:
    gas (int): txn gas amount
    gasPrice (int): txn gas price in gwei
    value (str): value of the transaction
    to (str): txn to address
    from_ (str)

domain_vocabulary.DEX Aggregator: A platform that sources liquidity from multiple decentralized exchanges to find the best swap route
domain_vocabulary.Smart Order Router (SOR): Odos algorithm that finds optimal multi-hop trade routes across 1050+ liquidity pools
domain_vocabulary.pathId: Unique identifier for a quoted swap path, valid for 60 seconds before assembly
domain_vocabulary.slippageLimitPercent: Maximum acceptable percent difference between quoted and executed price
domain_vocabulary.chainId: EVM chain identifier (e.g. 1 for Ethereum mainnet)
domain_vocabulary.liquidity source: A DEX, AMM, order book, lending protocol, or RFQ system providing token swap liquidity
domain_vocabulary.zap: Single-transaction liquidity provisioning using any input token combination
domain_vocabulary.RFQ: Request for Quote - off-chain liquidity sources with time-sensitive quotes
domain_vocabulary.compact: Odos V2 optimized call data encoding for lower gas costs
domain_vocabulary.pathVizImage: Base64-encoded SVG visualization of the swap routing path
domain_vocabulary.netOutValue: USD value of output tokens after deducting gas costs
domain_vocabulary.priceImpact: Percent decrease in realized price vs initial price due to trade size
domain_vocabulary.permit2: ERC-2612 permit signature scheme for gasless token approvals
domain_vocabulary.referralCode: Partner code enabling fee sharing and usage tracking for integrators
domain_vocabulary.EVM: Ethereum Virtual Machine - the runtime for smart contracts on compatible chains
domain_vocabulary.ERC-20: Standard Ethereum token interface used for all Odos input/output tokens
domain_vocabulary.sourceBlacklist: List of liquidity provider names to exclude from routing
domain_vocabulary.sourceWhitelist: List of liquidity providers to exclusively use for routing
domain_vocabulary.poolBlacklist: List of specific pool addresses to exclude from routing
domain_vocabulary.assemble: Step that converts a quoted pathId into executable on-chain transaction data
domain_vocabulary.gasEstimate: Estimated gas units required to execute the swap transaction
domain_vocabulary.gweiPerGas: Gas price in gwei units used for fee calculation
